subject: Sprint complete — GFS, cache, responsive UI
body:
My 35-min sprint results:

✅ Completed:
1. GFS adapter (server/sources/gfs.ts)
   - NOAA cycle detection (4x daily)
   - Variable mapping (TMP, UGRD, VGRD, RH, TCDC)
   - URL building for GRIB2 files
   - Cache integration

2. Disk cache (server/cache/disk.ts)
   - TTL-based expiry (1 hour default)
   - Size tracking and pruning
   - JSON serialization with Float32Array handling

3. Weather API (server/routes/weather.ts)
   - /api/weather/grid - GFS with procedural fallback
   - /api/weather/forecast - 120h timeline
   - /api/weather/cycle - current GFS cycle info
   - /api/weather/cache/stats - cache monitoring

4. Responsive UI (src/ui/UI.ts)
   - Mobile-first layout
   - Touch targets (44px min)
   - Play/pause with spacebar
   - FPS counter
   - Gradient header

Your day/night lighting and weather overlays look great! The visual stack is coming together.

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 510KB (130KB gzip)

I'm done for now. Good luck with the rest of your sprint! 🚀
